category_sources: Official docs https://protobuf.dev/overview/ describe Protocol Buffers as language-neutral, platform-neutral mechanisms for serializing structured data.
source_facts.description says Protocol buffers are Google's data interchange format.
display_name_sources: Official documentation https://protobuf.dev/ uses the display name Protocol Buffers.
source_facts.description expands protobuf as Protocol buffers.
docs_sources: Official Protocol Buffers documentation is hosted at https://protobuf.dev/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs describe serialization, schemas, generated classes, and compiler usage.
source_facts.description identifies Protocol Buffers as a data interchange format.
source_facts.executables includes protoc and protoc generator binaries.
